<thought>
I am at cell row 01 column B and facing right (`>`). My goal is at row 04 column C. I need to move forward to reach the goal. Since the cell to the right is blocked by a wall, I need to turn left (counter-clockwise) to face down (`v`) and then move down one step.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and facing down (`v`). My goal is at row 04 column C. I need to move forward to reach the goal. The cell to the right is blocked by a wall, so I need to turn left (counter-clockwise) to face left (`<`) and then move left one step.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column B and facing left (`<`). My goal is at row 04 column C. I need to move forward to reach the goal. The cell to the right is blocked by a lava cell, so I need to turn around (clockwise) to face right (`>`) and then move right one step.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>
